title: MorisMos Pig Teddy with Babies inside, Lifelike Cuddly Piggy Stuffed Animal Plush Soft Toys, Kawaii Presents for Kids Girls Boys Birthday Party Decoration (40 cm)
features: Surprising 5-in-1 Toys: This pig toy set includes a 40cm mummy plush with 4 baby piggy that can be removed and stored via a high quality zip on the mummy's belly; easy to store and carry; perfect size to take anywhere

Funny and Educational: Realistic pig teddy family set with babies inside toy is great for story time or tea parties and to add to playtime. This super adorable farm stuffed animal will provide your little one with imaginative play and fun!
Soft & Cuddly: Softest materials for the ultimate cuddle and squeeze experience, skin-friendly and well stitched, great for cuddling and sleeping, a favorite play and bedtime companion for growing up
Surprise Present: Surprise your kids with this stunning and real-looking pig plush family set - perfect for birthdays, holidays, Halloween, Christmas, theme party, and other occasions!

Warm Tips: MorisMos uses a vacuum sealed package, please do not worry. Once opened, the soft toy will take its shape, it takes about 30 minutes. And patting will make the soft toy pulsh restore the shape quickly. If you have any problems, please contact us, we need to help you resolve it. We are always here for you.
description: Product Description Looking for a soft and cuddly gift for your loved one? Meet the MorisMos adorable pink pig teddy with animal inside Toy~ MorisMos pig plushies are absolutely amazing! They are made with the highest quality materials, perfect companions for snuggling and cuddling This product is crafted from the softest materials, offering an unparalleled level of comfort and durability. Its pig plush texture and well-stitched construction make it ideal for cuddling and sleeping. It is also suitable for play and bedtime, becoming a cherished companion for children as they grow. Their lilfelike and expressive design is sure to put a smile on anyone's face. Whether you're a child or an adult who loves farm animals, these plushies are perfect for you! Improve boys and girls' imagination and creativity, and increase interaction between parents and children. The MorisMos 5-piece animal plush set is absolutely adorable! It includes a super-soft stuffed mommy pig soft toy and four little babies, perfect for imaginative play and tea parties. Get ready for some serious cuteness overload! This set is sure to become a favourite playtime and bedtime companion as children grow up. Let's enhance children's imagination and creativity while promoting interaction between parents and their kids! This is a great opportunity to bond with your little ones and have fun together. Perfect soft and cuddly play companions for children. MorisMos pig plush toys are perfect for animal enthusiasts and make the best gifts for any occasion, including birthdays, holidays, Children's Day, Easter, Halloween, Christmas!
